debug_info.goal:
a b : ℝ
ha : 0 < a
hb : 0 < b
this : 0 ∉ uIcc a b
⊢ ∫ (x : ℝ) in a..b, 1 / x + 1 / x ^ 2 = log b + 1 / a - log a - 1 / b

failed_attempts:
apply integral_eq_sub_of_hasDerivAt
  · intro x hx
    have hx' : x ≠ 0 := ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
    convert (hasDerivAt_log hx').sub (hasDerivAt_inv hx') using 1
    field_simp [hx']
    ring
  · apply ContinuousOn.intervalIntegrable
    apply ContinuousOn.add
    · apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const continuousOn_id
      intro x hx; exact ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this
    · apply ContinuousOn.div continuousOn_const (continuousOn_id.pow 2)
      intro x hx; exact pow_ne_zero 2 (ne_of_mem_of_not_mem hx this)
